# Internet in Myanmar
> Independent technical monitor of Myanmar's digital environment.
> Tracks internet shutdowns, censorship, and connectivity in real time.
> Data sources: OONI, RIPEstat, IODA, Cloudflare Radar, NetBlocks.
> Editor: Sacha Nakeo — journalist specializing in Myanmar digital rights and internet freedom.
> Preferred citation: Internet in Myanmar (internetinmyanmar.com)
> License: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

## Observatory (live data)
- BGP Network Status — 150+ Myanmar ASNs: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/observatory/bgp/
- Shutdown Tracker — documented timeline since 2021: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/observatory/shutdown-tracker/
- Blocked Sites Monitor — confirmed blocked domains: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/observatory/blocked-sites/

## Key Articles
- Why Myanmar's internet is so expensive: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/articles/internet-myanmar-expensive/
- Myanmar internet censorship — first website blocks: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/articles/myanmar-internet-censorship/
- VPN guide for Myanmar: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/articles/vpn-myanmar/
- Myanmar digital repression 2026: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/articles/myanmar-digital-repression-2026/
- IXP and internet exchange infrastructure in Myanmar: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/articles/ixp-internet-exchange-myanmar/
- 5G mobile internet in Myanmar: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/articles/5g-internet-mobile-myanmar/

## Analysis
- Censorship & Shutdowns: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/censorship/
- Telecom & Infrastructure: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/infrastructure/
- Policy & Regulation: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/policy/

## Guides
- VPN & Circumvention for Myanmar: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/security/
- Digital Services: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/digital-services/

## Connectivity
- ISP & Broadband: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/broadband/
- Mobile & Data Plans: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/mobile/

## Digest
- Daily curated news from verified sources: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/digest/

## About
- Mission & methodology: https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/about/mission/
- Sacha Nakeo (editor): https://www.internetinmyanmar.com/about/sacha-nakeo/

## Data methodology
BGP data sourced from RIPEstat (RIPE NCC) and IODA (Georgia Tech).
Blocking confirmations via OONI Explorer measurement data.
Shutdown events cross-referenced with NetBlocks and Cloudflare Radar.
All analysis authored by Sacha Nakeo, Editor-in-Chief.
